creator: tremere@cainites.net
text:
Created attachment 199633
Update to PowerDNS Recursor 4.1.8

This update fixes the following security advisory:
- PowerDNS Security Advisory 2018-09 (CVE-2018-16855)

Full changelog: https://doc.powerdns.com/recursor/changelog/4.1.html#change-4.1.8

Buildlog: https://pkg.cainites.net/data/latest-per-pkg/powerdns-recursor/4.1.8/freebsd_11x64-system.log
